mapper.select: SELECT 'hsePolicy' AS title ,'/HsePolicy' AS route ,'hsePolicyDesc' AS description , case when hsePolicy.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_hse_policy thp WHERE thp.comp_id = #{compId} AND confirm_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS hsePolicy UNION ALL SELECT 'objectivesAndActionPlan' AS title ,'/ObjectivesAndActionPlan' AS route ,'objectivesAndActionPlanDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN objectivesAndActionPlan.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 from esg.tb_approval_info tai left join esg.tb_action_objective_plan taco on taco.doc_type = tai.target_type and taco.write_year = LEFT(tai.target_id, 4) and taco.doc_no = right(tai.target_id, 5) where LEFT(tai.target_id, 4) = #{searchText} and taco.doc_type = 'OBJ' and tai.param = 'approver' and taco.comp_id = #{compId} and tai.signature is not null ) as exist ) AS objectivesAndActionPlan UNION ALL SELECT 'detailedActionPlan' AS title ,'/DetailedActionPlan' AS route ,'detailedActionPlanDesc' AS description , CASE WHEN DetailedActionPlan.exist THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 from esg.tb_approval_info tai left join esg.tb_action_objective_plan taco on taco.write_year = LEFT(tai.target_id, 4) and taco.doc_no = right(tai.target_id, 5) where LEFT(tai.target_id, 4) = #{searchText} and tai.target_type = 'OBJP' and tai.param = 'approver' and taco.comp_id = #{compId} and tai.signature is not null ) as exist ) AS DetailedActionPlan

SELECT 'safetyAndHealthOrganChart' AS title ,'/SafetyAndHealthOrganChart' AS route ,'safetyAndHealthOrganChartDesc' AS description , case when safetyAndHealthOrganChart.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_org_chart thp WHERE thp.comp_id = #{compId} AND thp.use_yn = 'Y' ) as exist ) AS safetyAndHealthOrganChart
